meta.name: nOS
meta.description: Agentic Home Lab — all-in-one self-hosted FOSS platform

stacks.name: Infrastructure
stacks.description: Shared databases, cache, reverse proxy, identity

services.name: MariaDB
services.description: Relational database for WordPress, Nextcloud, ERPNext, FreeScout, FreePBX
services.notes: Root login: root / <password>. Databases auto-created for dependent services.

services.name: PostgreSQL
services.description: Relational database for Mattermost, Outline, Metabase, Superset
services.notes: Root login: postgres / <password>

services.name: Redis Docker
services.description: In-memory cache and pub/sub for cross-stack access (ERPNext, Outline, Superset)
services.notes: No authentication by default. Alternative to Homebrew Redis for Docker services.

services.name: Portainer
services.description: Docker management web UI
services.notes: Login: admin / <password>. Admin account must be created within 5 minutes of first start.

services.name: Traefik
services.description: Reverse proxy and ingress controller for local development
services.notes: Dashboard on port 8080. HTTP/HTTPS on ports 80/443.

services.name: Bluesky PDS
services.description: AT Protocol Personal Data Server for federated identity and SSO
services.notes: Admin via pdsadmin CLI: pdsadmin account create. Federated identity: @user.bsky.dev.local

services.name: Grafana
services.description: Monitoring dashboards and visualization
services.notes: Login: admin / <password>

services.name: Prometheus
services.description: Time-series metrics database and alerting
services.notes: Localhost only, accessed via Grafana. Retention: 30d.

services.name: Loki
services.description: Log aggregation system (Grafana Loki)
services.notes: Localhost only, accessed via Grafana. Retention: 31d.

services.name: Tempo
services.description: Distributed tracing backend (Grafana Tempo)
services.notes: Localhost only, accessed via Grafana. Retention: 7d. OTLP gRPC :4327, HTTP :4328.

services.name: Grafana Alloy
services.description: Telemetry collector — metrics, logs, traces (replaces node_exporter on ARM64)
services.notes: UI on port 12345. Public OTLP gRPC :4317, HTTP :4318. ARM64-safe collectors only.

services.name: WordPress
services.description: Content management system (CMS)
services.notes: Login: admin / <password>. Auto-install via wp-cli.

services.name: Nextcloud
services.description: Self-hosted cloud storage, calendar, contacts
services.notes: Login: admin / <password>

services.name: n8n
services.description: Workflow automation platform
services.notes: First registration = owner. No default password. For Ollama AI: Settings > Credentials > Ollama, Base URL: http://host.docker.internal:11434

services.name: Kiwix
services.description: Offline Wikipedia, Gutenberg, ZIM content server
services.notes: No authentication. Add .zim files to kiwix data dir or use kiwix_zim_files config.

services.name: Tileserver GL
services.description: Offline map tile server with MBTiles support
services.notes: No authentication. Add .mbtiles files to maps data dir.

services.name: Jellyfin
services.description: Media server for movies, TV shows, music
services.notes: Setup wizard on first launch. No automated admin account creation.

services.name: Open WebUI
services.description: Chat UI for Ollama local LLM inference
services.notes: Login: admin@dev.local / <password>. Auto-registered first admin via API.

services.name: Uptime Kuma
services.description: Uptime monitoring dashboard with notifications
services.notes: Login: admin / <password>. Auto-created via Python script on first run.

services.name: Calibre-Web
services.description: Ebook server and web reader
services.notes: Login: admin / admin123 (linuxserver image default). Change immediately in Admin > Edit Users.

services.name: Home Assistant
services.description: Home automation and IoT platform
services.notes: Onboarding wizard on first launch. No automated admin account creation.

services.name: RustFS
services.description: S3-compatible object storage (MinIO drop-in replacement)
services.notes: Web console on port 9001. S3 API on port 9010.

services.name: Gitea
services.description: Self-hosted lightweight Git server
services.notes: Login: <system user> / <password>. SSH on port 2222.

services.name: Woodpecker CI
services.description: Lightweight CI/CD pipeline engine for Gitea
services.notes: Login via Gitea OAuth2. Requires OAuth2 app in Gitea: Settings > Applications > OAuth2.

services.name: GitLab
services.description: Full DevOps platform with built-in CI/CD, registry, and project management
services.notes: Heavy (~4 GB RAM). Internal PostgreSQL, Redis, Sidekiq. SSH on port 2224. First login uses root password from initial_root_password file.

services.name: ERPNext
services.description: CRM, ERP, HR, and accounting platform
services.notes: Login: Administrator / <password>

services.name: FreeScout
services.description: Helpdesk and ticketing system (HelpScout alternative)
services.notes: Login: admin@dev.local / <password>. Auto-setup via ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASS env vars.

services.name: Mattermost
services.description: Team chat and collaboration platform (Slack alternative)
services.notes: First registration = admin.

services.name: Outline
services.description: Team wiki and knowledge base
services.notes: Requires SSO/OAuth provider (Bluesky PDS, OIDC, etc.).

services.name: FreePBX
services.description: PBX and call center (Asterisk-based)
services.notes: Admin login set during wizard. SIP :5060, IAX :4569, RTP :10000-10100.

services.name: QGIS Server
services.description: GIS map server for geospatial data
services.notes: No authentication. Serves WMS/WFS/WMTS from QGIS project files.

services.name: Metabase
services.description: Business intelligence dashboards and SQL analytics
services.notes: First registration = admin.

services.name: Apache Superset
services.description: Data visualization and exploration platform
services.notes: Login: admin / admin (after docker exec superset init).

services.name: Nginx
services.description: Web server, reverse proxy, PHP-FPM, SSL termination with 24 vhost templates
services.notes: Vhosts auto-activate based on install_* flags. 24 vhost templates in templates/nginx/sites-available/.

services.name: dnsmasq
services.description: Automatic *.dev.local DNS resolver (no /etc/hosts editing)
services.notes: Resolves *.dev.local to 127.0.0.1. LAN access enabled by default.

services.name: Ollama
services.description: Local LLM inference engine (no API key required)
services.notes: Default model: qwen3:14b. Max 1 model in RAM (36GB). API at http://localhost:11434.

services.name: OpenClaw Gateway
services.description: Autonomous DevOps AI agent (Inspektor Klepitko) with Ollama backend
services.notes: Runs as launchd daemon. Agent persona: Inspektor Klepitko. Max 4 concurrent agents, 8 sub-agents.

services.name: Authentik
services.description: SSO / Identity Provider (OIDC, SAML, LDAP) for all services
services.notes: Login: akadmin / <bootstrap_password>. OIDC providers created automatically via authentik_oidc_apps registry.

services.name: Infisical
services.description: Centralized secrets vault with REST API, CLI, and SDK (E2EE)
services.notes: First user = admin. Organization: nos. Encryption key is crown jewel — back up offline.

services.name: Vaultwarden
services.description: Bitwarden-compatible personal password vault for tenants
services.notes: Admin panel: https://pass.dev.local/admin. Signups disabled by default.

services.name: Puter
services.description: Cloud OS web desktop — multi-user, AI gateway, iframe apps
services.notes: First user = admin (password in docker logs). Ollama auto-detected at localhost:11434.

services.name: Paperclip
services.description: Multi-agent orchestration platform for AI agents (OpenClaw, Claude Code)
services.notes: Authenticated mode (0.0.0.0 bind). PostgreSQL + Redis from infra stack.

services.name: IIAB Terminal
services.description: Public SSH TUI hub — Kiwix, AI chat, service directory for LAN users
services.notes: SSH access: ssh home@<ip>. ForceCommand TUI, no shell escape. Python Textual framework.

languages.name: PHP
languages.notes: PHP-FPM + Composer. Memory limit: 256M, upload max: 64M, timezone: Europe/Prague.

languages.name: Bun
languages.notes: JavaScript runtime, bundler, and package manager.

languages.name: Python
languages.notes: Managed via pyenv. Includes AI/ML and observability packages.

languages.name: Go
languages.notes: Go tools installed via go install.

languages.name: .NET
languages.notes: C# and F# support. Installed via Homebrew Cask (dotnet-sdk).

macos_settings.name: Extended macOS defaults
macos_settings.description: Finder, keyboard, dock, Safari, accessibility, screenshot settings

macos_settings.name: Terminal configuration
macos_settings.description: Terminal theme and secure keyboard entry

macos_settings.name: Power management
macos_settings.description: pmset: display sleeps, computer stays awake for network services (SSH, Jellyfin, Grafana)

macos_settings.name: External SSD data migration
macos_settings.description: Redirect data-heavy paths (Docker, Ollama, caches) to external SSD

macos_settings.name: Shell extras
macos_settings.description: Starship prompt, shell aliases (bat, eza, fzf, zoxide, lazygit)

system_services.name: SSH Remote Login
system_services.description: Remote Login / SSH server. Key-only auth by default (ssh_password_auth: false).

system_services.name: Samba file sharing
system_services.description: SMB file sharing for Windows/Linux clients.

system_services.name: VNC screen sharing
system_services.description: Screen sharing via VNC / Apple Remote Desktop.

fields.label: Default password prefix for all services
Tailscale pre-auth key (optional, interactive login without it)
